title: Elemental Chess
description: Choose Water, Earth, Fire, or Air, face a rival, and play a complete cinematic 3D chess match in a Mint-authored elemental world.

prompt.objective: Build cinematic 3D chess with four factions, selectable rivals, and placeable worlds.

mintAssets.brief: Four six-role armies and four themed chessboards.
Four elemental courtyards with RAD streams and colliders.
Elemental ambience and move, capture, check, and victory cues.

experience: Choose a faction and rival, then play a complete legal solo match.
Orbit or flip the board and persist each world's placement.
prompt.visualDirection: Faction-colored tabletop sculptures, luminous UI, and cinematic courtyards.

thumbnail.alt: Water Tribe and Fire Nation sculptures face each other across an ornate icy chessboard.

social.title: Elemental Chess
social.description: Choose an elemental nation and command its sculpted army in a cinematic 3D chess match.

image.alt: Water Tribe and Fire Nation sculptures face each other across an ornate icy chessboard.
